per_row_status.phrase: I feel like nothing in my life makes sense right now
I'm scared no one understands what I'm going through
My chest is tight and I can't stop worrying about everything
I lost my mother last month and the world feels empty
I just got the news I've been praying for and I want to thank Allah properly
I lost my temper at my kids again and I hate how I reacted
I did something I'm too embarrassed to even say out loud
Things feel impossible but I'm trying to believe they'll get better
I watched the sunrise this morning and just felt how big Allah is
I keep falling into the same sin and I don't know how to stop
I just want to feel close to Allah again, it's been so long
I just got a hard diagnosis and I'm trying not to fall apart
My toddler had another meltdown and I feel like the worst parent
I'm drowning in deadlines and I can't see the end of this week
My spouse and I keep hurting each other and I don't know how to fix it
I prayed but it feels like nothing happened, like no one heard me
I'm afraid something bad is going to happen to my family
I'm so happy today I just want to share it with everyone
I'm completely burned out and even small tasks feel impossible
I keep comparing myself to everyone else and feeling like I'm behind
I'm starting to wonder if my faith is even real or if I'm just going through motions
My parents and I are barely speaking and every conversation turns into a fight
Rent is due and I don't know how I'm going to make it work this month
I have a huge decision to make and I'm frozen, scared of choosing wrong
I keep thinking about death lately and it scares me how unprepared I feel
